# technitium_blocked_zone (Resource)

Manages an entry in the Technitium DNS Server Blocked Zones list.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "technitium_blocked_zone" "ads" {
  domain = "ads.example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain name to add to the Blocked Zones.
